data.title: Democrats are urging CFTC and ethics watchdog on prediction market insider trading as Kalshi and Polymarket plan guardrails to prevent misconduct.
data.description: Two popular prediction markets, Kalshi and Polymarket, are under investigation for suspected insider trading. As a response, they are implementing measures to prevent such incidents. This move comes as the industry continues to grow, with Kalshi boasting over 10,000 active users and Polymarket seeing a surge in trading volume over the past year. The platforms are working to establish safeguards to ensure fair and transparent trading practices in the future.

data.title: Google has revised estimates, stating fewer qubits are needed for cracking crypto than previously thought.
data.description: Google recently revised its estimates regarding the quantum computing resources required to compromise elliptic curve cryptography. The tech giant now predicts that a quantum computer would need to have approximately 20 million physical qubits to successfully break the encryption, a significant increase from the previous estimate of 1 million qubits. This update showcases the rapid advancements in quantum computing technology and highlights the potential challenges faced by current cryptographic systems in the face of these developments.

data.title: NFL calls on prediction markets to address 'easily manipulated' bets; CFTC Chair suggests deferring to league for action on event contracts.
data.description: Chairman Michael Selig of the CFTC stated that the agency is likely to rely on the football league to initiate changes to event contracts that may be altered by just one individual.

data.title: Is a $53M Bitcoin short by a whale on Hyperliquid a cause for concern among traders amidst geopolitical risks and regulatory uncertainty?
data.description: Bearish sentiment is evident in the cryptocurrency market as traders grapple with geopolitical uncertainties, regulatory issues, and macroeconomic data. This is exemplified by a substantial $53 million short position taken on Bitcoin on Hyperliquid, signaling a lack of confidence in the market's upward trajectory. Investors are cautious due to the prevailing global instability and uncertainty surrounding regulations, leading to a significant amount of funds being wagered on the cryptocurrency's decline.

data.title: Average U.S. gas prices reach $4 per gallon following Persian Gulf oil disruptions due to U.S.-Israeli attacks and Iran's response.
data.description: It has been 30 days since the initial attacks between the United States, Israel, and Iran caused a halt in Persian Gulf oil production. As a result, consumers are experiencing a notable increase in fuel prices at gas stations.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) price at $468.60 eyes $495 breakout as bulls aim for $491 resistance, analysts predict $495 by early April 2026.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin Cash (BCH) is currently trading at $468.60, with indicators suggesting a possible challenge of the $491 resistance level. Analysts predict a target price of $495 by the beginning of April 2026.

data.title: Ericsson to power majority of Virgin Media O2's UK RAN network through major partnership extension
data.description: Ericsson is set to expand its Radio Access Network (RAN) footprint through a next-gen network upgrade with Virgin Media O2. The company will be the primary recipient of the majority of Virgin Media O2's latest investment in their radio network, as part of the Mobile Transformation Plan. This partnership extension will allow Ericsson to significantly increase its presence in the market and capitalize on the growing demand for enhanced connectivity.

data.title: Coway Holds 37th Annual General Meeting
data.description: In a recent meeting in Seoul, South Korea, shareholders of Coway Co., Ltd. have given their approval to all proposed agenda items put forth by the board. This includes the implementation of cumulative voting, electronic general meetings, and a revision of the quarterly dividend record date. These changes aim to enhance shareholder rights within the company. The decision was made on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Nokia wins new 5G RAN deal with Virgin Media O2 to accelerate its Mobile Transformation Plan
data.description: In a recent announcement, Nokia revealed that it has secured a significant contract with Virgin Media O2 (VMO2) to provide a new 5G Radio Access Network over the course of multiple years. This deal is expected to have a substantial impact on the telecommunications sector, with Nokia playing a crucial role in enhancing VMO2's network infrastructure for the future. The specific financial details of the deal have not been disclosed yet, but given the scope and duration of the partnership, it signifies a major advancement in Nokia's presence and influence within the 5G market.

data.title: TREASoURcE Final Conference: 14 April 2026, Brussels – Circular Systemic Solutions: From Demos to Deployment
data.description: In Helsinki and Brussels, an EU-funded project is facilitating discussions among policymakers, industry representatives, and urban stakeholders to explore ways in which circular economy initiatives can expand beyond trial phases. The project aims to foster collaboration and promote the scalability of circular economy solutions.

data.title: UNI price aims $4.15 before April surge, trading at $3.50, RSI 44.36. Potential $5.00 by month-end. Technical analysis shows consolidation.
data.description: The cryptocurrency UNI is currently trading at $3.50, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 44.36. Analysts are eyeing a target of $4.15, which is the Bollinger Band resistance level. Technical indicators signal a period of consolidation before a potential breakout towards $5.00 by the end of April.
